name: yagr
description: Canvas-based high-performance timeseries chart renderer built on uPlot. Use for real-time or large-dataset timeseries visualizations without ChartKit plugin overhead.
when_to_use: Canvas-based high-performance timeseries chart renderer built on uPlot
avoid: Not for SVG/D3-level customization — use @gravity-ui/charts. Not for simple one-off charts without timeseries — use charts. Not when chart type is managed via a plugin registry — use chartkit.
not_for: Not for SVG/D3-level customization — use @gravity-ui/charts. Not for simple one-off charts without timeseries — use charts. Not when chart type is managed via a plugin registry — use chartkit.

name: YagrReact
description: A React wrapper for the Yagr canvas-based high-performance chart renderer (built on uPlot). Initializes a Yagr instance on mount, supports dynamic config updates or hard resets, and exposes the underlying Yagr instance and DOM element via ref.
when_to_use: For high-performance timeseries charts with large datasets
When canvas-based rendering is preferred over SVG/DOM
For real-time updating charts with frequent data changes
When stacked areas, plot lines, or configurable legends are needed
avoid: For simple one-off charts without timeseries — use Chart from @gravity-ui/charts instead
When you need SVG output or D3-level customization

props.name: id
props.description: Unique HTML id for the chart container div

props.name: config
props.description: Yagr chart configuration object (timeline, series, axes, scales, etc.)

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the chart wrapper

props.name: update
props.description: Update strategy when config changes: dynamic (default) keeps zoom state, hard fully reinitializes

props.name: debug
props.description: Debug config: enables Ctrl+Shift+Click to download chart as PNG

props.name: onChartInited
props.description: Fires when chart instance is created

props.name: onChartLoad
props.description: Fires after chart has finished drawing

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires on every range selection with start/end timestamps

ref: YagrReactRef — exposes yagr() to get the Yagr instance and domElement() to get the chart div

name: useTooltipState
description: Connects a custom tooltip component to a Yagr chart's tooltip plugin events. Subscribes to render and show events and calls tooltip.onChange(data) with the latest tooltip handler data.
when_to_use: When building a custom React tooltip overlay for a YagrReact chart
When you need to sync tooltip visibility/content with React state
avoid: When using Yagr's built-in tooltip renderer — this hook is only for custom React tooltips
signature: useTooltipState(yagrRef: React.MutableRefObject<YagrReactRef | null>, tooltipRef: React.RefObject<{ onChange: (data: TooltipHandlerData) => void }>): void

parameters.name: yagrRef
parameters.description: Ref to the YagrReact component instance

parameters.name: tooltipRef
parameters.description: Ref to the custom tooltip component with an onChange method
